_comment: Per-program catalyst queue (spec/03). Shape and the accountability invariant are unchanged from v1: first_expected_window is written once and never edited; expected_window revisions must append to slip_log; queue_tamper (blocking) enforces both. Items carry fed_by (competitor_discovery|scheduled|manual) and bears_on_thesis_slot. Seeded empty: run #1 has null windows and creates the baseline later continuity checks compare against.
